summary: Both Round-1 majors are genuinely resolved, not relabeled. The no-flicker guarantee is now enforced by an explicit ownership handshake (disown previous Job, flip flag to true, then cancelAndJoin; the outgoing finally only clears the flag if it still owns warmupJob), and is pinned by the new staysTrue_acrossCancelAndRestart test. persistLastUsedModelId and the AC-F3 observer both wrap the DataStore I/O in try/catch that rethrows CancellationException and logs via errorLog.e("settings-io", ...). The handover does not introduce a new observable race: restartMutex serialises all entries into launchWarmup, so during cancelAndJoin's suspension warmupJob is null but no concurrent caller can observe or mutate it. Test harness upgrade (StandardTestDispatcher + gated CompletableDeferred + awaitLogFile polling on length > 0 && substring match + softened fake defaults) is a strict improvement.
